ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "year_discontinued" INTEGER /* Year the model was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "displ" REAL /* Engine displacement of the vehicle */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "trans" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "drive" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle */,
  "fuel" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "veh_class" TEXT /* Vehicle class */,
  "air_pollution_score" INTEGER /* Air pollution score of the vehicle */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City mileage of the vehicle */,
  "hwy_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway mileage of the vehicle */,
  "cmb_mpg" INTEGER /* Combined mileage of the vehicle */,
  "greenhouse_gas_score" INTEGER /* Greenhouse gas score of the vehicle */,
  "smartway" TEXT /* Smartway certification label */,
  "engine_power_hp" INTEGER /* Engine power in horsepower */,
  "engine_torque_nm" INTEGER /* Engine torque in newton-meters */,
  "top_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Top speed in miles per hour */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60_mph" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "weight_lbs" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "length_inches" INTEGER /* Length of the vehicle in inches */,
  "width_inches" INTEGER /* Width of the vehicle in inches */,
  "height_inches" INTEGER /* Height of the vehicle in inches */,
  "cargo_capacity_cubic_feet" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity in cubic feet */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "production_volume" INTEGER /* Number of units produced */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the vehicle */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the vehicle record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive FOREIGN KEY ("drive") REFERENCES drives ("drive_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_trans FOREIGN KEY ("trans") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel FOREIGN KEY ("fuel") REFERENCES fuels ("fuel_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_veh_class FOREIGN KEY ("veh_class") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "number_of_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "transmission_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drives" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive type */,
  "drive_name" TEXT /* Name of the drive type */,
  "drive_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the drive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuels" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fuel type */,
  "energy_density_mj_per_l" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel in megajoules per liter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that the emission record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission record */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Emission value for the vehicle in that year */,
  "co2_emissions_g_per_mile" REAL /* CO2 emissions in grams per mile */,
  "nox_emissions_g_per_mile" REAL /* NOx emissions in grams per mile */,
  "pm_emissions_g_per_mile" REAL /* Particulate matter emissions in grams per mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumptions" (
  "fuel_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel consumption record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that the fuel consumption record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the fuel consumption record */,
  "fuel_consumption_value" REAL /* Fuel consumption value for the vehicle in that year */,
  "fuel_consumption_gallons_per_100_miles" REAL /* Fuel consumption in gallons per 100 miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumptions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
